title: Resolve establishing a special commission on paid family and medical leave for public employees
summary: For legislation to establish a special commission on paid family and medical leave for public employees. Labor and Workforce Development.

actions.action: Referred to the Joint Committee on Labor and Workforce Development
Hearing scheduled for 07/22/2025 from 10:00 AM-01:00 PM in B-2
Bill reported favorably by committee, as changed and referred to the Joint Committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
Committee recommended ought to pass and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means
